tuning: E A D G B E
content:
SONG:   BULLETPROOF
ARTIST: NATE SMITH

TAB BY: DON CZARSKI
EMAIL:  GUITARZAN7@HOTMAIL.COM


                           BULLETPROOF
                           NATE  SMITH

CAPO: 5th FRET

[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
  Usually these ol' neon lights[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Are pretty good for bad goodbyes[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
They got some girls off of my mind[/tab]

But baby, not tonight

[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I've been putting in overtime[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
Trying to get over your leaving[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
You're still right here on my mind[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
You sure did a number on me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
And I've tried Jack, I've tried Jim[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
And I've tried every last one of them[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Ol' heartbreak bottles up on that shelf[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
But the burn don't work and the buzz don't help[/tab]

[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Been taking these shots, shots, shots[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
80, 90, everything they've got[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
But the whiskey don't kill like it's supposed to do[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, your memory must be bulletproof[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
  There ain't no way I'm driving home[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm three sheets, done tied  one on[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
But this liquor ain't as strong[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]
As your sweet love is[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
And I've tried Jack, I've tried Jim[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
And I've tried every last one of them[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Ol' heartbreak bottles up on that shelf[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
But the burn don't work and the buzz don't help[/tab]

[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Been taking these shots, shots, shots[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
80, 90, everything they've got[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
But the whiskey don't kill like it's supposed to do[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Baby, your memory must be bulletproof[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
All my favorite country songs[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Guess they must've got it wrong[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause I'm still here and you ain't gone[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
You ain't gone, baby[/tab]


[Instrumental/Solo]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
And I've tried Jack, and I've tried Jim[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
I've tried every last one of them[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Ol' heartbreak bottles up on that shelf[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
But the burn don't work and the buzz don't help[/tab]

[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Been taking these shots, shots, shots[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
80, 90, everything they've got[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
But the whiskey don't kill like it's supposed to do[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Baby, your memory must be bulletproof[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
All my favorite country songs[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Guess they must've got it wrong[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause I'm still here and you ain't gone[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
You ain't gone, baby[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
      Oh, oh[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
You ain't gone, baby[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
      Baby, your memory must be bulletproof[/tab]
